title: Tractema tingitana
properties:
Tractema tingitana is known for its antioxidant properties. 
It has been reported to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. 
Tractema tingitana may also be used to reduce oxidative stress and protect against cell damage. 
Its potential therapeutic properties make it a subject of interest in natural medicine research. 
Further studies are needed to confirm and expand on the plant's therapeutic applications.
